heading: State statutes superseded
label: 31307 State statutes superseded
text: This chapter supersedes any State statute conferring a lien on a vessel to the extent the statute establishes a claim to be enforced by a civil action in rem against the vessel for necessaries.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)3130746:975Section 31307 provides for preemption of State laws to the extent a claim for necessaries is enforced by a civil action in admiralty against the vessel.in rem
Effective DateSection effective , with certain exceptions and qualifications, see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1989section 107 of Pub. L. 100–710section 31301 of this title
